texto: As Gates had told the pastor that day in his house. "I can do anything I put my mind to".

texto: Trey Gate's maternal grandmother, Adelle Maxwell, was also an important influence on him, encouraging him to read as much as possible, pushing him to excel in all that he did, challenging him to use his mind. They played card games together frequently, especially games like Concentration that required mental agility.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a James Wallace: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Trey Gate's maternal grandmother, Adelle Maxwell, was also an important influence on him, encoura…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, mind-power, games pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
